operations.description: Get a list of platform tasks

errors.description: Errors that occured on the task

status.description: Current global status of the current task

common.CurrentTaskStatusEnum.description: Current status of a task. A task in ERROR cannot be retried without your inputs. PENDING tasks will be executed as soon as possible. A RUNNING task is currently executing your original request. SCHEDULED is used for tasks that will be executed in the future
